---
title: "workshop3_metasm"
author: "CaterinaPalma"
date: "2026-07-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  include = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE)
```

# Workshop 3 

## Examine Reads 

### Step 1. Making Sub-Directory 
and then making a symbolic link. 

```bash 
mkdir raw_data
cd raw_data
ln -s /pvol/data/metagenome_assembly/reads_R10_0.5.fastq.gz raw_reads.fastq.gz
```

then back up out of raw data... 

```bash 
cd ..
``` 

### Step 2. Check files are correct using "ls" 
This lists all files and directories in the project. Use the "-l" option to show extended details on each file which will allow you to see the source and target paths for the symbolic link. 

```bash
ls -lR .
``` 

# Read Length Distribution 
Taking shorter sequences and trying to connect them to longer sequences. 

```bash 
zcat raw_data/raw_reads.fastq.gz | head -n 40000 | bioawk -c fastx '{print $name,length($seq)}' > read_lengths.txt
```
